# Social Media Manager — Extended AI Documentation

> Comprehensive reference for AI crawlers, coding assistants, and browsing agents.
> Last updated: July 2026 | Version: 1.0.0

## Table of Contents

1. Platform Overview
2. API Authentication
3. Core Endpoints Reference
4. Scheduling System
5. Publishing System
6. AI Content Generation
7. Analytics System
8. Platform Integration
9. Error Handling
10. Rate Limits

---

## 1. Platform Overview

Social Media Manager is an AI-powered social media scheduling and publishing platform. Users can create content, schedule posts across 5 platforms (LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), track analytics, A/B test variations, and manage their entire social media presence from a single dashboard.

**Key differentiators:**
- Real API integrations (not mock data) for all 5 platforms
- AI-powered content generation and adaptation per platform
- Data-driven scheduling recommendations from actual analytics
- A/B testing with automatic winner selection
- Content lifecycle management (draft → approve → schedule → publish → track)

---

## 2. API Authentication

### Login
```
POST /api/auth/login
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "password"
}

Response:
{
  "access_token": "eyJhbGciOi...",
  "token_type": "bearer"
}
```

### Register
```
POST /api/auth/register
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "password",
  "name": "John Doe"
}
```

### Using the Token
```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

All endpoints (except auth) require a valid JWT token.

---

## 3. Core Endpoints Reference

### Posts
| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/api/posts/{workspace_id}` | GET | List posts (paginated) |
| `/api/posts/{workspace_id}` | POST | Create post |
| `/api/posts/{workspace_id}/{post_id}` | GET | Get single post |
| `/api/posts/{workspace_id}/{post_id}` | PUT | Update post |
| `/api/posts/{workspace_id}/{post_id}` | DELETE | Delete post |
| `/api/posts/{workspace_id}/schedule` | POST | Create + schedule to multiple platforms |

### Scheduling
| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/api/scheduler/schedule` | POST | Schedule post to platforms |
| `/api/scheduler/queue` | GET | Get publishing queue |
| `/api/scheduler/queue/{id}/retry` | POST | Retry failed item |
| `/api/scheduler/queue/{id}` | DELETE | Cancel scheduled item |
| `/api/scheduler/best-times` | GET | Best posting times per platform |
| `/api/scheduler/calendar/events` | GET | Calendar events |
| `/api/scheduler/calendar/reschedule/{id}` | POST | Drag-and-drop reschedule |

### AI Content
| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/api/scheduler/captions/generate` | POST | AI caption for one platform |
| `/api/scheduler/captions/generate-multi` | POST | AI captions for multiple platforms |
| `/api/scheduler/captions/improve` | POST | Improve existing caption |
| `/api/scheduler/hashtags/generate` | POST | AI hashtag generation |
| `/api/scheduler/hashtags/analyze` | POST | Analyze existing hashtags |
| `/api/scheduler/calendar/generate` | POST | AI-generate full month calendar |
| `/api/scheduler/repurpose` | POST | Repurpose content to multiple formats |
| `/api/scheduler/adapt-content` | POST | AI-adapt content for a platform |
| `/api/scheduler/translate` | POST | Translate caption to another language |

### Analytics
| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/api/analytics/dashboard` | GET | Analytics dashboard overview |
| `/api/scheduler/analytics/cross-platform` | GET | Cross-platform unified metrics |
| `/api/scheduler/analytics/cohorts` | GET | Cohort analysis |
| `/api/scheduler/analytics/audience-growth` | GET | Audience growth trends |
| `/api/scheduler/analytics/content-gaps` | POST | Content gap analysis |
| `/api/scheduler/forecast` | POST | Predict content engagement |

### Publishing
| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/api/scheduler/health` | GET | Check all platform API health |
| `/api/scheduler/health/{platform}` | GET | Check one platform |
| `/api/scheduler/rate-limits` | GET | Rate limit status |
| `/api/scheduler/dead-letter` | GET | Failed publishes |
| `/api/scheduler/dead-letter/{id}/retry` | POST | Retry failed item |

---

## 4. Scheduling System

### Multi-Platform Scheduling
```
POST /api/scheduler/schedule
{
  "post_id": "post-123",
  "platforms": [
    {"platform": "linkedin", "caption": "Custom LinkedIn caption"},
    {"platform": "x", "caption": "Short X version"},
    {"platform": "instagram", "scheduled_at": "2026-07-20T11:00:00Z"}
  ],
  "default_scheduled_at": "2026-07-20T10:00:00Z"
}
```

### Recurring Series
```
POST /api/scheduler/recurring/create
{
  "template": "weekly_thread",
  "content_items": [
    {"topic": "Growth Strategy", "content": "This week we learned..."},
    {"topic": "Product Update", "content": "New features shipped..."}
  ],
  "start_date": "2026-07-21T09:00:00Z",
  "platforms": ["x", "linkedin"]
}
```

### Content Dependencies
```
POST /api/scheduler/dependencies/add
{
  "post_id": "post-announcement",
  "depends_on_post_id": "post-teaser"
}
```

---

## 5. Publishing System

### Platform Publishers

**LinkedIn** — REST API v2 UGC Posts
- Supports: text, images (5 max), video (10min), documents
- Auth: OAuth 2.0 with page/person tokens
- Rate limit: 100 posts/day

**X/Twitter** — API v2 + v1.1 media upload
- Supports: text (280 chars), images (4), GIFs, video (140s free)
- Auth: OAuth 2.0 PKCE
- Rate limit: 50 tweets/day (free)

**Facebook** — Graph API v19
- Supports: text, images, video (4hrs), links
- Auth: Page access token
- Rate limit: 25 posts/page/day

**Instagram** — Content Publishing API
- Supports: images, carousels (10), Reels (90s)
- Auth: Facebook Page token + IG user ID
- Rate limit: 25 posts/day, 200 API calls/hour

**YouTube** — Data API v3 with native `publishAt`
- Supports: video upload with scheduling
- Auth: OAuth 2.0 with youtube.upload scope
- Rate limit: 6 videos/day, 10,000 quota units/day

---

## 6. AI Content Generation

### Providers
- **OpenAI** — GPT-4o, GPT-4o Mini
- **Anthropic** — Claude Sonnet 4, Claude 3.5 Haiku
- **Google Gemini** — Gemini 2.0 Flash, Gemini 2.5 Flash
- **OpenRouter** — 200+ models via unified API
- **DeepSeek** — DeepSeek V3, DeepSeek R1

### Content Repurposing Routes
| Route | Source → Target | Platform |
|-------|----------------|----------|
| `blog_to_thread` | Blog → X Thread | X |
| `blog_to_linkedin` | Blog → LinkedIn Post | LinkedIn |
| `blog_to_carousel` | Blog → Instagram Carousel | Instagram |
| `blog_to_reel` | Blog → Reel Script | Instagram |
| `video_to_shorts` | Video → YouTube Shorts | YouTube |
| `thread_to_post` | Thread → LinkedIn Post | LinkedIn |
| `post_to_story` | Post → Instagram Story | Instagram |

---

## 7. Analytics System

### Metrics Tracked
- Impressions, Reach, Engagement, Clicks
- Likes, Comments, Shares (per platform)
- Follower/Subscriber growth
- Best posting times (data-driven)
- Content performance by type

### Analytics Endpoints
- `/api/analytics/dashboard` — Overview with trends
- `/api/scheduler/analytics/cross-platform` — Unified view
- `/api/scheduler/analytics/cohorts` — Group by platform/time/type
- `/api/scheduler/analytics/audience-growth` — Growth trends
- `/api/scheduler/forecast` — Predict engagement
- `/api/scheduler/reports/analytics` — Generate HTML/JSON report

---

## 8. Error Handling

### Error Response Format
```json
{
  "detail": "Error message",
  "status_code": 400
}
```

### Common Error Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 400 | Bad request / validation error |
| 401 | Unauthorized (invalid/missing token) |
| 403 | Forbidden (insufficient permissions) |
| 404 | Resource not found |
| 409 | Conflict (duplicate entry) |
| 422 | Validation error (content too long, etc.) |
| 429 | Rate limited |
| 500 | Internal server error |

---

## 9. Rate Limits

| Platform | Daily Limit | Hourly API Calls |
|----------|------------|-----------------|
| LinkedIn | 100 posts/day | — |
| X/Twitter | 50 tweets/day | 200/15min |
| Facebook | 25 posts/page/day | 200/hour |
| Instagram | 25 posts/day | 200/hour |
| YouTube | 6 videos/day | 10,000 quota units/day |

System rate limit: 100 requests per 60-second window per user.

---

## 10. Webhooks

### Supported Platforms
- **Facebook** — Feed updates, comments
- **Instagram** — Media updates, comments
- **YouTube** — Video upload notifications (PubSubHubbub)

### Webhook Endpoint
```
POST /api/scheduler/webhooks/{platform}
```

### Signature Verification
Facebook: HMAC-SHA256 with app secret
YouTube: HMAC-SHA1 with hub secret
